title: FAIL: Wrong loxodrome period (declared 12 for cosmos orbit)
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: declares period=12 for (1,1) mod 24, which actually has period 24 (Pisano period). Also declares satellite orbit, but period 24 = cosmos. The Pisano period is mathematically determined — declaring a different period is a structural error.

fail_ledger.reason: Pisano period is determined by (b₀,e₀) mod m. Cannot be freely declared.
Orbit classification follows from period. Wrong period → wrong orbit.
